column2: (SELECT avg("value") AS avgmilk FROM measurements AS m INNER JOIN sensors AS s ON ((s.id = m.sensor_id)) WHERE ((s.unit = 'L') AND (mp.cow_id = m.cow_id)) GROUP BY cow_id)
column3: (SELECT avg("value") AS avgweight FROM measurements AS m INNER JOIN sensors AS s ON ((s.id = m.sensor_id)) WHERE ((s.unit = 'kg') AND (mp.cow_id = m.cow_id)) GROUP BY cow_id)
